title: malvastrum grandiflorum
intro: Malvastrum grandiflorum, also known as the velvetleaf or mallow bush, is a plant species in the mallow family that is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malvastrum grandiflorum include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, and then using them in various formulations.
